title: An Act to Amend the Law Governing the Authority of the Governor to Set Salary Rates for State Police Command Staff
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Mar 17, 2026
last_house_action: 1/7/2026 - Committee on Criminal Justice and Public Safety suggested and ordered printed. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on CRIMINAL JUSTICE AND PUBLIC SAFETY . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/17/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
